name: Buttermilk Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel 3 lbs. potatoes and cut into cubes (2-inch square).
2. Place in a 4-quart saucepan with enough water to cover.
3. Bring to a boil, then lower heat and simmer for about 15 minutes or until tender.
4. Drain the water from the potatoes.
5. Add butter, buttermilk, salt, pepper, and remaining butter to a large bowl.
6. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth and creamy.
7. Place in serving dish and dot with additional butter.
